admin.name: Administrator
admin.description: Full system access including user management, settings, and reports. Can delete any data.

mechanic.name: Mechanic
mechanic.description: Can manage customers, vehicles, appointments, jobs, and estimates. Cannot delete data or access admin features.

inspector.name: Inspector
inspector.description: Can perform vehicle inspections and create estimates. Cannot delete data or access admin features.

hero.title: Tera Auto Repair
hero.subtitle: Your Trusted Partner for Professional Auto Repair Services
hero.description: With over 15 years of experience, we provide expert automotive repair and maintenance services. From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, we keep your vehicle running smoothly and safely.

subscriptions.title: Service Plans
subscriptions.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your auto repair needs

engine_repair.title: Engine Repair
engine_repair.description: Complete engine diagnostics, rebuilds, and repairs for all makes and models.

brake_service.title: Brake Service
brake_service.description: Brake pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and complete brake system maintenance.

transmission.title: Transmission Service
transmission.description: Automatic and manual transmission repair, rebuild, and maintenance services.

electrical.title: Electrical Systems
electrical.description: Battery replacement, alternator repair, and complete electrical system diagnostics.

ac_heating.title: A/C & Heating
ac_heating.description: Air conditioning repair, heating system service, and climate control maintenance.

suspension.title: Suspension & Steering
suspension.description: Shock absorber replacement, alignment, and steering system repair.

oil_change.title: Oil Change Service
oil_change.description: Regular oil changes with premium filters to keep your engine running smoothly.

inspection.title: Vehicle Inspection
inspection.description: Comprehensive safety inspections and pre-purchase vehicle evaluations.

about.title: About TeraMotors
about.subtitle: Your Neighborhood Auto Repair Experts
about.description: Founded in 2008, TeraMotors has been serving the community with honest, reliable auto repair services. Our certified technicians use state-of-the-art equipment and genuine parts to ensure your vehicle receives the best care possible.
about.mission: Our mission is to provide honest, transparent, and high-quality auto repair services that keep you and your family safe on the road.

values.honesty: Honest, transparent pricing with no hidden fees
values.quality: Only genuine parts and premium service
values.convenience: Flexible scheduling and quick turnaround times

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to schedule your next service?

landing_missing.trusted_by_thousands: Trusted by thousands of customers in more than 5 countries
landing_missing.trusted_by_leading_organizations: We are proud to work with these respected organizations
landing_missing.sign_in_to_manage: Sign in to manage your auto repair business
landing_missing.testimonial_1: TeraMotors has been servicing my fleet for 5 years. Their attention to detail and honest pricing keeps me coming back.
landing_missing.testimonial_2: When my car broke down unexpectedly, TeraMotors got me back on the road quickly and affordably. Highly recommended!
landing_missing.testimonial_3: The team at TeraMotors understands cars like no one else. They've kept my classic car running perfectly for years.
